description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 디지털 구조의 교차점을 탐구하는 플로라-9은 식물학이 사이버네틱 통합을 통해 진화한 미래를 보여줍니다.
description.en: An exploration of the intersection between organic life and digital architecture, Flora-9 represents a future where botany is enhanced by cybernetic integration.

prompt: A hyper-realistic digital nature scene featuring 'FLORA-9', a bioluminescent plant with glowing fiber-optic petals and integrated circuitry veins. Set in a dark, high-tech greenhouse with floating holographic pollen and soft cyan ambient lighting. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, macro photography, intricate details of synthetic growth.
